valid_tests.comment: Minimum threshold subset of signers
Reordering the signer set leaves the deterministic output unchanged, because the identifiers are sorted before they are bound into the nonce derivation and the binding value
A different threshold subset gives a different deterministic nonce, since the signer set is bound into the nonce derivation
Auxiliary randomness omitted (null), which is not equivalent to all-zeros randomness
Auxiliary randomness is all ones, distinct from the all-zeros and omitted cases
All signers participate, signed by a non-first member of the signer set
Empty message
Non-standard message length (38 bytes)
Single x-only tweak applied

error_tests.comment: Signer's identifier is absent from the signer set

error.message: The signer's id must be present in the participant identifier list.

error_tests.comment: Signer set contains a duplicate id

error.message: The participant identifier list contains duplicate elements.

error_tests.comment: Signer's public share is not in the public share list

error.message: The signer's pubshare must be included in the list of pubshares.

error_tests.comment: A public share is not a valid point

error.message: Invalid pubshare at index 1.

error_tests.comment: A signer id is outside the valid range [0, n-1]

error.message: The participant identifier at index 0 is out of range.

error_tests.comment: Signer set's public shares do not match the threshold public key

error.message: The provided key material is incorrect.

error_tests.comment: Aggregate of the other signers' nonces is invalid: first half has an unknown tag 0x04
Aggregate of the other signers' nonces is invalid: first half is all zeros
Aggregate of the other signers' nonces is invalid: second half is not a point on the curve
Aggregate of the other signers' nonces is invalid: second half's x-coordinate exceeds the field size
Tweak exceeds the group order

error.message: The tweak value is out of range.

error_tests.comment: Fewer signers than the threshold t

error.message: The number of signers must be between t and n.

error_tests.comment: Secret share is out of range (zero)

error.message: The signer's secret share value is out of range.
